attempt: Close the bounded-gap shortcut: a statistic that remains positive after deleting all exact gap-2 pairs cannot by itself imply the twin prime conjecture.
formal_micro_lemma_statement: Any proof route whose decisive statistic is invariant under deleting exact gap-2 pairs while retaining bounded gaps proves at most a bounded-gap statement, not infinitely many exact twin pairs.
closed_obligation: Reject bounded-gap-only substitutions for twin-prime infinitude.
remaining_obligation: A genuine twin-prime proof needs an unconditional lower bound for exact gap 2 at arbitrarily large scale.
claim_boundary: No Twin Prime proof and no Twin Prime counterexample.
